summary_en: 6,000,000 ordinary shares cancelled (1.2% of shares outstanding). Effective 2026-05-29. Post-cancellation issued shares: 492,000,000.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Cancellation of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: OBIC Co., Ltd. completed the cancellation of 6,000,000 ordinary shares on 2026-05-29, pursuant to a resolution passed by the Board of Directors on 2026-04-21 under the authority of Article 178 of the Companies Act. The cancelled shares represented 1.2% of the shares outstanding prior to cancellation. Following the cancellation, the total number of issued shares stands at 492,000,000.
